_source: OSV.dev — AEGIS dev/test fixture (sample AI ecosystem advisories)

vulns.summary: Sample advisory: arbitrary code execution in a hypothetical langchain helper
vulns.details: A malicious version of @aegis-dev/langchain-helper was published that exfiltrates the developer's environment at install time via a postinstall script. Update to a patched version or remove the package.

vulns.summary: Sample advisory: prototype-pollution in openai client
vulns.details: The openai npm SDK shipped a transitive dependency that allowed prototype pollution. Patched in 5.x.

vulns.summary: Unrelated CVE — must be filtered out by AI-package allow-list
vulns.details: Affects requests; not an AI package.
